positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a crescent moon and a constellation of luminous stars, emerging from deep, cosmic ink-blue space. The design should feature clean, crisp line work and strong, contrasting silhouettes, emphasizing the elegant curve of the moon and the geometric patterns of the stars. The color palette should be restricted to matte blacks, deep indigo blues, and touches of bright, ethereal gold for the stars. The overall composition must be centered and highly scalable for apparel print. Style: Graphic, Nordic minimalist, celestial tattoo art. Lighting: Dramatic, high contrast, backlit luminescence. Composition: Centered, symmetrical/radial balance, negative space utilization.
negative: blur, text, watermark, logo, artifact, low quality, bad anatomy, disfigured, extra limbs, noise, grainy, signature, caption
